title: 20. Synthetic data, MLOps, image generation concepts
description: synthetic_data_generator; model registry/finetunes; image gen cost/safety concepts.
story:
Synthetic data: generate realistic-but-fake catalogs for demos and tests without customer PII.
This repo: graph/synthetic_data_generator.py + data/synthetic_diagnosis_data.json paths.

MLOps: train/eval/deploy/monitor models as products.
Here: models/registry.yaml pins aliases; models/finetunes/ README for future fine-tunes;
evals gate quality; LLM path optional.

Image generation (concept): diffusion/autoregressive models turn prompts into pixels;
ops concerns = content safety, cost per image, latency, prompt versioning, abuse rate limits.
Not the core warranty engine — but FinOps/security still apply if you add it.

AIOps: apply ML/automation to ops signals (anomaly detection on metrics, auto-remediation).
Pair with Prometheus rules today; smarter detectors later.
one_liner: Synthetic ABox for safe demos; MLOps = registry+eval+deploy; images need safety+cost controls.
why_it_matters: Demos must not leak real customer data.
Fine-tunes without eval gates are reckless.
Image/LLM features change cost and abuse surface.
say_aloud: Synthetic generators build demo catalogs without production PII.
Model aliases are pinned in registry.yaml.
Fine-tunes need baseline evals before promotion.
Image generation needs safety filters and unit cost tracking.
AIOps automates ops using telemetry — start with alerts, then models.

cheat_sheet.meaning: Adapt base model on domain data

beats.title: Synthetic data role in this monorepo
beats.goal: Separate synthetic demo data from production SoR truth.
beats.code:
graph/synthetic_data_generator.py
  → builds demo Product/Symptom/FM structures
data/synthetic_diagnosis_data.json (path via settings)
  → offline catalog for local graphs

Rules:
  • Label simulated provenance so analysts know it is not live SAP
  • Never train production models on unreviewed synthetic-only data without validation
  • Prefer multi-source ABox promote path for "real" knowledge growth
beats.say_after: Synthetic is for safe demos; governed ABox for truth.

beats.title: MLOps loop (memorize)
beats.code:
Data → Train/Fine-tune → Eval gates → Registry pin → Deploy (flag/alias)
  → Monitor quality/cost/latency → Rollback or retrain

Repo hooks:
  models/registry.yaml     pin alias → provider model id
  models/finetunes/        future fine-tune artifacts + eval_baseline note
  evals/                   quality/safety floors
  gateway/                 runtime routing when llm_enabled
  finops/budget.py         cost circuit breaker
beats.say_after: Eval before pin; monitor after deploy; budget always.

line_quiz.prompt: What gates promotion of a new model alias?

beats.title: Image generation ops checklist
beats.goal: List ops controls for image features.
beats.code:
If adding image generation to a product:
  1. Content safety filters (NSFW, brand abuse)
  2. Rate limits + authz (who can generate)
  3. Cost per image metric + FinOps budget
  4. Prompt/version logging (PromptOps)
  5. Retention policy for outputs
  6. Latency SLO separate from diagnose p99
  7. Red-team prompts (indirect injection via images/docs if multimodal)

Not required for core warranty GraphRAG path.
beats.say_after: Safety, cost, rate, retention, SLO — then model choice.

concepts.definition: Engineering culture/tools for production ML lifecycle.
concepts.say_aloud: Treat models like versioned products with gates.

concepts.definition: Automating operations using analytics/ML on telemetry.
concepts.say_aloud: Alerts first; smarter detection when data matures.

self_quiz.q: Why not train only on synthetic?
self_quiz.a: May not match real distributions; need validation.

further_reading.title: Ho et al., Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (image gen)

final_boss: Draw MLOps loop and map each step to a repo path.
